title: Old Man
body:
**its like a modpack with legacy mods with texture pack and a shaders and there's some optimisation mods i think, i also made a screenshot in gallery to show how it looks like**

i'd recommend using [**Golden Days**](https://github.com/PoeticRainbow/golden-days) texturepack.

![image](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/594815387917352962/1106635931915665418/222855808-fd047fa8-0e36-4693-8957-7ea68d4457b1_1_1.png)
